I INTRODUCTION 
I.1 Summary 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) OMI_WMHE: it provides 
mean value of watermass and heat exchanges for the 1993-2014 period and the last full year. 
 
OMI_WMHE includes three products:
